response.overview: "In the wake of a brutal riot, a mother and her child find themselves trapped in the remnants of their burnt home. Faced with marauding rioters, the mother strives to protect her child, navigating through the chaos of a destroyed market. The unfolding night reveals a grim reality of death and survival, testing the limits of human resilience. As the mother's efforts to escape take a tragic turn, the narrative unfolds a poignant tale of despair, loss, and the enduring strength of the human spirit in the face of senseless violence."
response.tagline: “One night. One child. A mother against the madness.
response.title: Dhuaan
